Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Flowing stairs that pose an obstacle to those who dare to reach another floor... So this is an "escalator."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 3 25 25}A simple contraption at first glance, but one false step will leave one mired in an exhausting ordeal...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}To all customers: For your own safety, and the safety of others, please do not move in the opposite direction of the escalators. Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}It seems that these "customers" may come to harm. We'd best exercise caution ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}Please watch your step! There is a pitfall just ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}There, in the center of this fenced-off area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It's marked with eye-catching signs, proclaiming in bold print, "Do Not Enter"![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 3 25 25}Humans are frequently drawn to what has been forbidden...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}This is a crafty snare, one that defies the common notion that pitfalls must be hidden.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Flowing stairways, pitfalls employing high-level psychological tactics...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Human authorities truly go to great lengths in their quest to preserve the town's law and order.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'm very moved by their dedication to the cause.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Let us carry on, our thoughts with the unsung heroes who give their love and lives to this town...[n]{f 1 1}
